display_information.name: Meow Emoji Generator
display_information.description: Create adorable custom cat emojis with AI! Use /meow to generate cute meow-style emojis for any emotion or situation. Powered by Google Gemini.
display_information.long_description:
Meow Emoji Generator brings AI-powered creativity to your Slack workspace! Generate unlimited custom cat emojis in the beloved 'meow' style - cute yellow cats with expressive faces perfect for any reaction.

Features:
- /meow [description] - Instantly generate a preview emoji from any description
- /meow-add [name] [description] - Generate and save emojis with custom names
- Style-matched generation using reference emojis for consistent look
- Transparent backgrounds ready for Slack
- Powered by Google Gemini AI image generation

Examples:
- /meow happy cat celebrating
- /meow cat drinking coffee on Monday
- /meow-add excited cat jumping with joy

Perfect for teams who love expressive reactions and want unique emojis that match their culture!

slash_commands.description: Generate a new custom meow emoji
